subject: Fwd: "Both Sides Now w/ Huffington & Matalin"
Fwd: "Both Sides Now w/ Huffington & Matalin"
body:
Dear Friend,

Mary Matalin and Hilary Rosen debate torture, Afghan, and Obama after Osama. How *is* the Barack & Hillary "Team of Rivals" performing on foreign policy? And the women clash on Gingrich and Gibson (Mel).

Here, fyi, is today's HuffingtonPost feature and audio:
[http://www.huffingtonpost.com/huff-radio/both-sides-now-w-huffingt_16_b_862240.html](http://www.huffingtonpost.com/huff-radio/both-sides-now-w-huffingt_16_b_862240.html)

Best,

Mark
